title: bihai borinquena
intro: Bihai borinquena, also known as Puerto Rican morning glory, is a climbing vine native to the Caribbean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of bihai borinquena include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of bihai borinquena can be made by infusing its flowers or leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
